description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:6.11.3 Docker image and a global cache with key cache_yarn storing .cache_yarn. Define stages install, build, test, and deploy, and add an install_client job in the install stage that runs cd ./client && yarn install --cache-folder ../.cache_yarn, runs only on staging and production, and stores client/node_modules as an artifact. Add an install_functions job in the install stage that runs cd ./functions && yarn install --cache-folder ../.cache_yarn, runs only on staging and production, and stores functions/node_modules as an artifact. Add a build_client job in the build stage that depends on install_client, runs only on staging and production, executes cd ./client && yarn build, and publishes client/build as an artifact; also add a test_client job in the test stage that depends on install_client, runs only on staging and production, and runs cd ./client && yarn test. Finally, add deploy_all_staging and deploy_all_production jobs in the deploy stage that depend on install_functions and build_client, run only on staging or production respectively, set the environment name accordingly, and each runs yarn global add firebase-tools --cache-folder ../.cache_yarn followed by firebase deploy with the appropriate $FIREBASE_DEPLOY_KEY and project (staging or production).
